name: Stuffed Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound ground beef, or ground turkey
1 to 2 chopped tomatoes, plus liquid (optional can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef.
2. Add onion, green pepper, and the chopped center scooped out of the eggplant after cutting it in half lengthwise. Salt the remaining eggplant and set aside.
3. Add mushrooms, tomatoes, and seasonings to the mixture. Cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
4. Meanwhile, microwave the eggplant halves on High for 2-4 minutes.
5. Stuff the eggplant with the meat mixture. Place any extra filling at the bottom of the pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1-1 1/2 hours until tender, or microwave on Medium for 15 minutes.
7. Optionally, top with grated Mozzarella cheese during the last few minutes.
